ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Lawrence for Anita Holquist.

Mr. Carr stated that the receipt for the blocked account was filed this morning (endorsed copy of order provided) and that the account is in both the name of the Minor (Annika) and the Executor. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was taken under submission for review of the receipt.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-10-2013 Continued To Dec-17-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Probate Examiner received a call from Mr. Carr indicating that he was having car problems. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was continued to December 17, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Jones. (Not Reported)
